# IntelliAds - AI Marketing Platform

## What is IntelliAds?
IntelliAds is an AI-powered marketing automation platform that creates, manages, and optimizes Google Ads, Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Ads, and Google Business Profile campaigns. It uses 6 specialized AI agents to build expert-quality ad campaigns in under 5 minutes.

## Who is it for?
- Local service businesses (plumbers, locksmiths, HVAC, dentists, lawyers, etc.)
- Small and medium businesses managing their own advertising
- Marketing agencies managing multiple client accounts

## Key Features
- AI Campaign Builder: 6 specialized agents (Strategist, Keyword Research, Targeting, Extensions, Ad Copy, QA) create complete campaigns
- AI Landing Page Generator: Creates SEO-optimized landing pages with Schema.org markup for each service
- Deep Optimizer: Autonomous campaign optimization with budget reallocation and bid adjustments
- Creative Studio: AI image generation for ads using DALL-E 3, Stability AI, Flux.1, and Google Gemini
- Multi-Platform: Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram), Google Business Profile
- Call Tracking: Integrated call tracking with AI-powered call scoring
- Competitor Intelligence: Ahrefs-powered competitor analysis and keyword gap identification

## Pricing
- Starter: $97/month (1 Google Ads account, up to $5K ad spend)
- Professional: $197/month (3 accounts, Google + Meta, up to $25K ad spend)
- Agency: $397/month (10 accounts, all platforms, unlimited ad spend)
- All plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required

## Contact
- Website: https://getintelliads.com
- Email: hello@getintelliads.com

## Technical Details
- Built with Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL
- Uses Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4o (OpenAI) for AI agents
- Google Ads API v17+, Meta Marketing API v22.0
- Real-time campaign deployment and optimization
